title: Revolutionizing DNA Data Storage: Automated Digital Microfluidic Systems with Integrated PCR for Dynamic Data Management
author: Ren, Qianlun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: We report a transformative advance in DNA data storage, realized through the integration of active digital microfluidics (ADM) and PCR technology. This integrated system enhances the fidelity of DNA-based data management, allowing for high-density storage, precise retrieval, and real-time sequence editing. By automating the storage process, the ADM platform significantly reduces errors, enhancing the reliability of the biomolecular data repository. Notably, the system's on-chip PCR enables selective data access akin to random-access in digital systems, while innovative genomic modification techniques allow for flexible data editing. This study marks a significant leap in DNA data storage, establishing new paradigms for bio-digital convergence in data management.
